title: Intense Canadian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty maple-infused lentil stew that embodies the cozy spirit of Canadian kitchens without animal products.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; sauté until vegetables soften and onion becomes translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in smoked maple syrup and dried thyme, cooking for 1 minute to release aromas.
Add lentils, bay leaf, vegetable broth, and diced tomatoes; bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until lentils reach al dente texture, about 12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove pot from heat, discard bay leaf, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the stew and give a final stir.
Serve hot in bowls, optionally garnished with a drizzle of olive oil.
